subject: MPI-76 will make small additive edit to MpiGalleryBlock.js (card-notes context-menu item)
body:
Starting MPI-76 (Project and Card notes). Part B adds a new 'Card notes' option to the gallery card right-click context menu, opening a new overlay editor (textarea + Save/Cancel) that persists notes into the card sidecar (.meta/<uuid>.json via POST /project-media/:id/update-meta).

This needs a SMALL ADDITIVE edit to two gallery files you currently have uncommitted:
- js/components/Compounds/MpiGalleryGrid/MpiGalleryGrid.js: add one item `{ key: 'card-notes', icon: 'edit', label: 'Card notes' }` to the contextmenu items array in _makeCard, plus one `if (key === 'card-notes') emit('card-notes', { group })` branch in onSelect.
- js/components/Blocks/MpiGalleryBlock/MpiGalleryBlock.js: add one `grid.on('card-notes', ...)` handler that opens the new overlay.

No refactor of existing code. Heads up for possible merge friction with your uncommitted MpiGalleryBlock.js + MpiGroupHistoryBlock.js work. If you are mid-edit in the contextmenu / _makeCard area of MpiGalleryGrid or the gallery block's event wiring, reply here and I'll coordinate.
